struct DVControl *DVGetControl(struct DVFrame *frame, enum DVPackType t) {
  int c;
  int offs;
  for (c = 0; c < 10; c = c + 1) {
    switch (t) {
    case DV_VIDEO_CONTROL:
      if (c & 1)
        offs = c * 12000 + 0xf8;
      else
        offs = c * 12000 + 0x1c5;
      break;
    case DV_AUDIO_CONTROL:
      if (c & 1)
        offs = c * 12000 + 0x6e3;
      else
        offs = c * 12000 + 0x15e3;
      break;
    case DV_TIMECODE:
      offs = 0x56;
      break;
    case DV_AUDIO_SOURCE:
      if (c & 1)
        offs = c * 12000 + 0x1e3;
      else
        offs = c * 12000 + 0x10e3;
      break;
    case DV_UNKNOWN:
    case DV_AUDIO:
    case DV_VIDEO:
    case DV_AUDIO_SOURCE_ID:
    case DV_AUDIO_SOURCE_ID_2:
    case DV_AUDIO_SOURCE_ID_3:
    case DV_AUDIO_SOURCE_ID_4:
